---
title: "m2b3 Output"
description: |

output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
---

### Preprints

* How anticipatory remapping along the saccade direction predicts perisaccadic biphasic mislocalization. [OSF Preprints](https://osf.io/bkaep/). Berreby YE, Kemp N, Gurevitch O, Krishna BS (2023).
   
* Correlations between different auditory temporal response properties of inferior colliculus neurons. [OSF Preprints](https://osf.io/rytvn/). Berreby YE, Krishna BS. (2023).

* Information integration across saccades plays a prominent role during goal-directed viewing of everyday scenes. [PsyArxiv](https://psyarxiv.com/8yta9). Jurewicz K, Liao B, Krishna BS. (2023).

* Correction of saccadic decisions during free-viewing visual search in the monkey. [OSF Preprints](https://osf.io/vt423). Ipata AE, Bisley JW, Krishna BS. (2023).

### Other

#### Output from m2b3 lab members continuing/completing their prior work.

* Neural populations within macaque early vestibular pathways are adapted to encode natural self-motion. Mohammadi M, *Carriot J*, Mackrous I, Cullen KE, Chacron MJ (2024).[PLoS Biol 22(4): e3002623] (https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.3002623)

* Investigating Efficient Deep Learning Architectures For Side-Channel Attacks on AES. [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.13170). *Berreby Y-E*, Sauvage, L. (2023).

* Jurewicz, K., Sleezer, B.J., Mehta, P.S., Hayden, B. Y., Ebitz, R.B.  (2024). Irrational choices via a curvilinear representational geometry for value. [Nat Commun 15, 6424.](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-49568-4)

* Wojciechowski, J., Jurewicz, K., Dzianok, P., Antonova, I., Paluch, K., Wolak, T., Kublik, E. (2024). Common and distinct BOLD correlates of Simon and flanker conflicts which can(not) be reduced to time-on-task effects. [Human Brain Mapping. 45(1), 1-16.](https://doi.org/10.1002/hbm.26549)

* Pupil size predicts the onset of exploration in brain and behavior. [BioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.05.24.541981v1). Shourkeshti A, Marrocco G, *Jurewicz K*, Moore T, Ebitz RB. (2023).

* ToFFi–Toolbox for frequency-based fingerprinting of brain signals. [Neurocomputing](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neucom.2023.126236), 544, 126236. Komorowski MK, Rykaczewski K, Piotrowski T, *Jurewicz K*, Wojciechowski J, Keitel A, Dreszer J, Duch W. (2023).

* Single-neuron spiking variability in hippocampus dynamically tracks sensory content during memory formation in humans. [bioRxiv](https://doi.org/10.1101/2023.02.23.529684). Leonhard Waschke, Fabian Kamp, Evi van den Elzen, *Suresh Krishna*, Ulman Lindenberger, Ueli Rutishauser, Douglas D. Garrett (2023).
